description: Strategist: Build the core growth strategy document at data/core_strategy.json. Read data/scout_analysis_20260307.json (deep competitor analysis with top performers, engagement patterns, market insights for EN and JP), data/growth_tweets_20260307.json (5 growth tactic tweets from @reon_x_1000man, @maind200, @seisei_ai_1st), and data/scout_compact_20260307.json (compact competitor data). Synthesize into a foundational, durable core strategy covering: account positioning & differentiation, content pillars & image style guidelines, posting cadence & optimal times, hashtag strategy per market, engagement & outbound approach, EN vs JP market-specific tactics. This is NOT a daily strategy — it's the permanent playbook that guides all future daily content. Make it principle-based and data-backed.
notes: Phase 3 of 3. Scout data and analysis already completed. The 5 shared links contain Japanese AI growth tips — integrate those tactics. Core strategy should be the foundational document for all daily operations going forward.
